author: anthony-spruyt
title: Desloppify penalizes SOLID principles, encourages coupling over composition
notes: Vague behavioral feedback with no specific code evidence. The abstraction_fitness dimension and single_use detector can flag some SOLID patterns (single-implementation interfaces, delegation chains), but skip/exemption lists explicitly account for DI/testability/boundary rationale. The coupling detector penalizes coupling, not encourages it. Claim about inheritance is unsubstantiated. References external repo for validation but provides no concrete desloppify output or code paths.
